unit_contract.florivory_unit: individual flower; percent tissue missing; clustered within plant
unit_contract.seed_unit: individual CH fruit; seed count; clustered within plant

A_flower.definition: percent of floral lip red-orange in early-season pre-treatment flowers

D_candidate.definition: relative floral condensed tannins in early-season pre-treatment flowers

models.response_contract: integer pollinator visits standardized to 60 minutes; no further effort offset because the processed outcome is already standardized
models.inference_contract: robust sandwich inference for independent individual-plant records

models.response_contract: percent tissue missing on individual flowers; Tot_Flwrs is open-flower abundance during survey and is not a damaged-tissue trial denominator
models.inference_contract: plant-cluster robust sandwich inference for repeated flower records

models.response_contract: integer seed count in each CH fruit; one fruit is one response record
models.inference_contract: plant-cluster robust sandwich inference for repeated fruit records

guardrails: Treat A_flower and D_candidate coefficients as observational associations, not causal trait effects.
Do not use visitor Seconds as an observation-effort offset; documentation identifies Pollinators_Per_Hour as already standardized to 60 minutes, while Seconds records individual visit duration.
Do not use Tot_Flwrs as a binomial denominator for Per_Florivory; the response is percent tissue missing on an individual flower.
Do not interpret the raw seed-count A:D term as total reproductive-fitness curvature or c_AD.
Do not select covariates after inspecting results; this config is the declared model set.
